title: Verify successful registration with valid data
preconditions: Cookies and local storage are cleared
steps: Select a valid date of birth with age 18+ on Step 2
Enter a valid nickname on Step 3
Select one body type option on Step 4
Enter a valid email address on Step 4
Select one relationship goal on Step 5
Enter a valid password with at least 5 characters
expected_result: User successfully completes the landing registration flow and is redirected to the next expected page without validation errors.

title: Verify validation for empty required fields
preconditions: User is on steps with required input fields
steps: Go to Step 3 and leave the name field empty
Go to Step 4 and leave the email field empty
Go to Step 5 and leave the password field empty
expected_result: Validation messages are displayed for all empty required fields: name, email, and password. User cannot proceed until valid data is entered.

title: Verify single-choice behavior for option blocks
preconditions: User is on Step 4 or Step 5
steps: On Step 4, select any body type option
On Step 5, select any relationship goal option
expected_result: Only one option can be selected at a time in each option block. When a new option is selected, the previous selection is automatically unselected.

title: Verify wizardAnswers cookie values after selecting landing answers
expected_result: The wizardAnswers cookie is created and contains correctly encoded values for selected answers. Body type value corresponds to the selected option id, and join reasons value corresponds to the selected option id.

title: Verify footer and policy links are displayed and clickable
preconditions: Footer is visible according to page behavior
steps: Check that required policy links are displayed
Click Billing Policy, Refund Policy, and Contact Us links
expected_result: All required footer links are visible, clickable, and redirect user to the correct pages without broken links or layout issues.
